title: Ancient mace
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Infobox Item |name = Ancient mace |image = [[File:Ancient mace.png]] |release = [[24 April]] [[2007]] |update = Another Slice of H.A.M. |members = Yes |quest = [[Another Slice of H.A.M.]] |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = It has ancient goblin symbols on it. |value = 1000 |alchable = No |weight = 1.814 |exchange = Yes |id = 11061 |leagueRegion = Asgarnia&Fremennik }} [[File:Ancient mace detail.png|left|130px]] The '''ancient mace''' is a [[weapon]] that can be acquired during the [[Another Slice of H.A.M.]] quest, when the player helps the [[Dorgeshuun]] archaeology team uncover ancient artefacts in the train tunnel from the [[Third Age]]. It's found that the mace was bestowed to [[Bandos]]' strongest [[goblin]] warriors during the [[God Wars]] to siphon favour of their enemies' god from their users.{{CiteNPC|quote='''General Bentnoze:''' That holy mace of Big High War God.
'''General Wartface:''' In time of great war, strongest goblin warriors carry maces like this.
'''General Bentnoze:''' They use them to take favour of gods away from enemy. If another god protecting enemy, goblin warrior use this mace and favour of god is stolen away!|loc=Another Slice of H.A.M.}} Although tradeable, it cannot be wielded until after a certain point in the quest; attempting to do so results in the message, {{mes|You must have received that mace in Another Slice of H.A.M to wield it.}} The ancient mace has stats in between those of a [[black mace]] and [[mithril mace]] (but with a 1 tick slower attack speed) and requires level 15 [[Attack]] and level 25 [[Prayer]] to wield. In addition, it can be equipped for protection against the [[Bandos]]ian followers in the [[God Wars Dungeon]]. If lost during the quest, it can be retrieved from [[General Bentnoze]] and [[General Wartface]] for 1,000 [[coins]]. After the quest, it can be retrieved from [[Tegdak]] for 1,000 coins, north-east of the [[Dorgesh-Kaan]] marketplace. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +10 |aslash = -2 |acrush = +16 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +14 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = +3 |slot = weapon |speed = 5 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Spiked |image = [[File:Ancient mace equipped.png|150px]] |altimage = [[File:Ancient mace equipped female.png|145px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Spiked|speed=5|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Favour of the War God.gif|frame|A player performing the ancient mace's special attack, ''Favour of the War God''.]] The ancient mace has a [[special attack]], ''Favour of the War God'', requiring 100% special attack energy, that hits through [[Protect from Melee]] and drains the [[Prayer points]] of the opponent by 100% of the amount hit, recharging the user's prayer points by the same amount. This can raise your current Prayer points to above your maximum Prayer level - up to the amount of damage inflicted by the attack. The accuracy roll of the special attack is based on the attack bonus of the player's current style, which is rolled against an enemy's crush defence.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/851077560805076992|date=9 April 2017|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/106989|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[Does the ancient mace special use the attack style you've chosen (stab or crush) or a specific style always?] It uses the one you chose, but rolls against the target's crush defence.}} The special attack will restore prayer even if used against a target that has immunity to conventional weaponry such as [[Turoth]]s and [[Kurask]]s, making this a useful special attack on slayer trips for restoring prayer. It is a useful tool while in the [[Nightmare Zone]] for restoring prayer after activating a power surge power-up, which gives the player infinite special attack energy. To maximise the number of [[prayer points]] restored, activating a strength-boosting prayer and drinking strength boosting potions before using the special attack is advised. ===Utility=== Players can boost their prayer points above maximum by using this special attack on a [[combat dummy]] in a [[player-owned house]] [[Combat Room|combat room]] in conjunction with damage-boosting gear, as hitting the dummy will always result in the player's max hit for that style. The maximum possible hit with the mace is a 44, using all best-in-slot gear apart from the amulet, using an [[amulet of avarice]] against a wilderness combat dummy. Players can hit up to 49 if they have Forinthry Surge, but this requires players to find and deal the most damage to the [[Revenant maledictus]], which is not worth the additional 5 max hits. The highest maximum hit possible can be obtained if [[While Guthix Sleeps]] has not been completed. At the very end of the quest, the player's stats are temporarily boosted to 255 by the [[Stone of Jas]]; with Piety and best-in-slot strength equipment a player can restore up to 78 prayer points on one of the [[tormented demon]]s. Note that unlike the combat dummy, landing a max hit against the tormented demon is not guaranteed, and leaving While Guthix Sleeps intentionally not completed will lock the player out of using [[tormented synapse]] weapons. Due to its extremely low price, if circumstances do not necessitate the health-recovering effect of the [[Saradomin godsword]], the ancient mace is a viable alternative. As such, the Saradomin godsword, which can restore up to 21 points per special attack — with each attack consuming 50% of the special attack bar — is a much more convenient option, which also has the added benefit of restoring [[hitpoints]]. The ancient mace is particularly advantageous in situations that do not allow players to use two-handed weapons, particularly Basilisks and Basilisk Knights, and for example on a house combat dummy where one quick attack is more beneficial than two separate attacks. ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Ancient mace}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 22 October 2025 |update = Grid Master Rewards, Poll & New Player Improvements |poll = Poll 83 - Castle Wars, New Player Changes & More |change = The ancient mace special attack can now penetrate prayers used by NPCs. }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 August 2024 |update = Poll 82 Changes |change = The yellow glow from the special attack animation has been adjusted to align with the mace. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ==Trivia== *Players cannot cast [[High Level Alchemy|High]] or [[Low Level Alchemy]] on the Ancient mace; doing so results in the message: ''This ancient artefact resists your magic.'' However, players can sell the mace to [[general store]]s for 400 coins. * Despite being described as "ancient", the mace is not associated with [[Zaros]], whom most ancient items are affiliated with. Instead, the mace is associated with the god Bandos. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Crush weapons}} {{Another Slice of H.A.M.}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Temporary skill boost]] [[Category:Prayer boosting items]]
